item.title: Unlim Cloud [File Management]
item.itunes:title: Unlim Cloud [File Management]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]
item.description:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]

item.title: Sokoban SG [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:title: Sokoban SG [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:author: green7
item.itunes:summary:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* Level Set File Formats; txt, sok, lvl, XSB (XSokoban), LP0 (G4B)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:
* Adjustable dockwidgets with selectable layouts
* Transparent colors/tiles/fonts/skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]
item.description:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* Level Set File Formats; txt, sok, lvl, XSB (XSokoban), LP0 (G4B)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:
* Adjustable dockwidgets with selectable layouts
* Transparent colors/tiles/fonts/skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* Level Set File Formats; txt, sok, lvl, XSB (XSokoban), LP0 (G4B)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:
* Adjustable dockwidgets with selectable layouts
* Transparent colors/tiles/fonts/skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]

item.title: Shadow Kernel [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Shadow Kernel [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: scaledzdn
item.itunes:summary:
Shadow Kernel
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Shadow Kernel for Poco M3 and Redmi 9T (chime/juice)
Android 11-14 with KSU and Non-KSU Supported.

item.title: Cute Chess [Chess]
item.itunes:title: Cute Chess [Chess]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Cute Chess
(Chess)
Cute Chess is a graphical user interface, command-line interface and a library for playing chess. Cute Chess is written in C++ using the Qt framework.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Cute Chess
(Chess)
Cute Chess is a graphical user interface, command-line interface and a library for playing chess. Cute Chess is written in C++ using the Qt framework.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Cute Chess
(Chess)
Cute Chess is a graphical user interface, command-line interface and a library for playing chess. Cute Chess is written in C++ using the Qt framework.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Mangayomi [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: Mangayomi [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Mangayomi
(TV & Streaming)
Mangayomi is free an open source manga reader and anime streaming cross-plateform app inspired by Tachiyomi and Aniyomi made with Flutter. It allows users to read manga and watch anime from a variety of sources.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Mangayomi
(TV & Streaming)
Mangayomi is free an open source manga reader and anime streaming cross-plateform app inspired by Tachiyomi and Aniyomi made with Flutter. It allows users to read manga and watch anime from a variety of sources.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mangayomi
(TV & Streaming)
Mangayomi is free an open source manga reader and anime streaming cross-plateform app inspired by Tachiyomi and Aniyomi made with Flutter. It allows users to read manga and watch anime from a variety of sources.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.description:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]

item.title: Random color picker [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Random color picker [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: honeymarie
item.itunes:summary:
Random color picker
(3D Graphics)
Let the Random Color Picker be your guide in exploring the visual spectrum. Embrace its randomness, embrace its versatility, and let the generated colors inspire and elevate your design work, artwork, or any other creative pursuit. With each click, a new color emerges, waiting to captivate and invigorate your visual creations with Wheelgames.
[read more]
item.description:
Random color picker
(3D Graphics)
Let the Random Color Picker be your guide in exploring the visual spectrum. Embrace its randomness, embrace its versatility, and let the generated colors inspire and elevate your design work, artwork, or any other creative pursuit. With each click, a new color emerges, waiting to captivate and invigorate your visual creations with Wheelgames.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Random color picker
(3D Graphics)
Let the Random Color Picker be your guide in exploring the visual spectrum. Embrace its randomness, embrace its versatility, and let the generated colors inspire and elevate your design work, artwork, or any other creative pursuit. With each click, a new color emerges, waiting to captivate and invigorate your visual creations with Wheelgames.
[read more]
